channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >online dating is the future of lo-ACK! — 93 replies — 218.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 93 • Updated: 2026-03-24 17:15 UTC

OP

>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62017513
>>62017496
We already had this thread. Bumble is merely a lesson in why women are retarded.

62017539
Its was just a way to spread stds to a control group of retards

62017623
>>62017496
Are these dating apps even useable on the free tiers? Any time I install one of these you literally cannot do anything unless you pay them some absurd monthly fee like $29 a month. Who actually pays for this crap?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62021356
>>62017496
>making a dating app that require women to take the initiative
yeah no shit

62021380
>>62018101
>>62018864
>>62019087
You all are just jealous

62021435
>>62017496
They got greedy, and it's all full of scammers.

62021478
>>62017623
I used Bumble free and I married a girl I met on there.
2 kids as well.
These apps just match you to actual people. I don't understand the seethe, unless you're ugly of course.

62021549
>>62017496
>Dating app crashes when women realize they can just onlyfags instead
Woah

62021571
>>62021478
You must have been using it in the 2010s. It’s all bots and microtransactions now

62022431
>>62017702
I want a virgin wife, though, not some degenerate whore. casual sex is unpleasant desu.

62023902
>>62019161
Oof a random fag makes u list ur life achievments. I got second hand embarassment from reading ur shit brah.

62023951
>>62017496
Time to pick up some cheapies!

62023997
>>62021049
An 18-year-old wearing that big-ass cubic zirconia on her pointer finger?
I don't think so.

62024069
>>62017702
kys shill

62024197
>>62017623
I think I spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.

It resulted in hookups with 15 girls.
Many of which I hooked up with multiple times.
Some of them were longer FWB situations.
A couple turned into actual relationships.

Even if you assume minimal ROI (only hooking up once) it cost me $40 per girl.
AND the premium features also saved me a lot of time on the app, that's ROI too.
Most of the money was spent in short bursts while abroad on trips when time was limited and I wanted to maximize my pull. I'm pretty sure I'd have missed these opportunities if I wasn't premium boosted to the max and all that.

$600 sounds like a lot of money but $40 a girl really is an amazing deal in my book.
The time sink the app still was is where the pain is, the grind that is dealing with all the flaking and ghosting. THAT is what sucks.

If you'd give me a machine that took $40 and delivered me a fun girl who is looking to hookup every single time I'd pay without hesitation until the end of time.

inb4 poorfags complain $40/g is a lot of money. $600 isn't even, literal peanuts for living out some great sexual fantasies and farming memories for a lifetime.

62024432
>>62019188
These dating sites were plagued with adulterers since the 90's. It was only ever good for people in their late teens to meet each other after 2000. That is where your nostalgia and lack of attention to what was going on with older people trying to find love during those brief glory days. I never tried it to avoid dating someone who was married.

62024446
>>62024197
>spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.
I agree wholeheartedly 100% with the pay approach and have done it myself, but the issue is that $600 won't get you nearly as far as it did 10 years ago due to the failing company greed and algo changes.

62024454
>>62017710
>indians and other non-whites
Serious question; how are white women supposed to use these sites if they always have 800 likes from India everyday?

62024523
dating apps became shitty because they got flooded with normies

a decade ago online dating was still somewhat taboo, you could pick up some hot alt chick looking a for a slutty thrill with minimal effort cuz online dating gave normies the ick

now every one and their mother is on the app, competition is so high you have better odds RETVRNing to tradition and trying your luck at a bar or night club

62024730
Why would I do any of that shit when cocaine is cheap and porn is free? I can stim goon all night and not have to deal with any of the bullshit of dealing with a woman.

62025482
>>62021571
Met her in 2022.

62025787
>>62017496
For those that want good results on dating apps here is some data from 2017 hinge to help increase match rate.

1. Black and white photo
2. Action video
3. Short to the point bio 1-2 sentences
4. Hide education if bachelors or lower
5. Veterinarian, MD, and pilot careers get most matches
6. 6foot + in height
7. Pet pics (dog beats cat) but a horse will beat out all pets and all previous listed information
8. A boat pic will single handedly beat horse height and career and all other listed information. A rowboat will get you matches more that a sports car.

PS this probably won't work now due to today's politics but setting your ethnicity or religion to Jewish will increase your match rate.

62025932
>>62017702
Unless you live in populated dense areas tinder and other dating apps suck

62025946
Is paying for dating apps a rip off for most people?

Chads need not respond.

62026034
What are the odds of finding someone like her GOD DAMN she build for breeding Kek got more insane tinder bumble pulls lol

62026279
>>62026034
you can find women like her at the gym, anon.

62026546
>>62017702
i don't want a hookup, hookups suck, i want a long term lover...

>>62021193
this age can be lowered to 25 if you're in a rural area. But yeah I'm 29 and the FOMO is real. Fuck fuck fuck. What do I do, what do I do, what do I do. Bros.. I don't want to have to choose between fat girls and single moms with negro babies. Apps aren't working and most mutual acquaintances "hey I have this single friend" have fallen through.

62026616
>>62018110
What the hell does this mean

62026623
>>62024730
To each his own

62026639
>>62017496
https://youtu.be/SbQu55bMvZs?t=1566

STOP APPROACHING WOMEN. STOP USING ONLINE APPS. STOP GIVING WOMEN ATTENTION

Stop Asking Women On Dates, stop texting them thinking you are interesting because you are not. The reason you are getting ghosted is because you text and try to be funny, try to make her laugh or sound interesting. If you do manage to go to the next step and are actually meeting up and then get ghosted, stop taking women on dates. That stuff doesn't work anymore in the current year.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pyEdsrfTd6Q

Most importantly stop approaching women, at least for a while. They are already seething and this will only get worse and worse as they get less and less attention from men.
If men can't display a modicum of power over society, this world and women, then I guess they don't hold much power at all.

item.title: Do indians post on this board? — 13 replies — 45.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Do indians post on this board?

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-24 17:24 UTC

OP

If not larp and ur legit w/ sharpie-in-the-poop/timetamped hands, please do an AMA. I have a curious.

Early replies (first 3)

62025460
>>62025457
saaar am poopjeet i shit on street saaar

62025470
>>62025460
Pls be posting the Sharpie saar you bluddy.

ALSO PLS NO REEDEEEM!!!!!

62025483
>>62025457
good morning sir

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025487
>>62025457
unironically this is the indian century. making my son study for hindi lessons, its gonna be important soon. we need to be able to compete

62025548
>>62025457
The world belongs to Dalits. We will enslave Brahmins and make them sanitation workers.

62025575
>>62025457
just asking that question cost me -50 izzat benchod

62025621
>>62025457

Go ahead AMA.

> verification not needed
> no use case for larping

62025624
There were literally an Indian shilling his services on /smg/ a week or 2 ago. Don't know if he still lurks here after the ban.

62025628
>>62025457
50% of the shitcoin shills
30% of the buy my bag shills
20% of the seething retards

62025644
>>62025457
i've been browsing /biz/ and joining /biz/ related telegram groups for two years
based on my experience, there are at least 2 indians constantly browsing here
one of them is severely mentally ill and the other one is pretty chill although super dumb and constantly falls for scams and rugs

62025651
>>62025457
West bengali sir here. I just had my streetfood dinner and im heading to the special street now

62025835
You know the world is ending when this subhuman scum it's at the helm. Not commanding the ship but asslickig those who do. Jam boys in a jam world.

62026679
>>62025487

item.title: US is bankrupt — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
US is bankrupt

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-24 17:30 UTC

OP

US is bankrupt

Early replies (first 3)

62026401
>borrow 40 trillion dollars
>spend it on building the most powerful military in history
>the debt collectors ask for the money back
>use your military to kill them

62026472
>>62026388
I voted for this

62026477
>>62026388
Powell should have lowered rates

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026489
>>62026388
>steve hanke
>Sep 23 2022
>According to CNBC’s September Fed survey of economists, fund managers and strategists, those surveyed said there’s a 52% chance that U.S. could enter into recession over the next 12 months.

>“The probability of recession, I think it’s much higher than 50% — I think it’s about 80%. Maybe even higher than 80%,” Hanke told CNBC’s “Street Signs Asia” on Friday.

lol that was literally the best time to buy

62026512
>>62026401
>chud discovers the "debt schizos are morons" talkingpoint

62026513
>>62026388
... and finished

62026660
>>62026489
2022 recession fud was wild.

62026692
>>62026401
Don’t bother looking into who the US government owes money to. DEFINITELY don’t bother looking into intra-governmental debt either.

62026696
>>62026388
>Good times!
Nothing screams a good times like zero job growth, double digit stealth inflation, shrinkflation and reduced quality of food, alcohol and goods.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 110 replies — 440.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 110 • Updated: 2026-03-24 17:29 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

62015928
>>62014587
Don't lie. Why do you think they call him WOOD? And he literally looks like a 7yo boy pedo, just look at him. If I googled "Pedophile" then Gavins picture would probably be #2, right after Epstein. And since we're talking about Epstein... Gavin and Epstein were partying all the time together.

62016012
>>62015928
Oh shit. You are a bot

62016043
>>62016012
Could a bot post pictures of his hands with a timestamp? Like I did here; >>62008295 ??? Makes no sense, right?

62016887
>>62016043
So are you for DOT or not

62016901
>>62016887
What do you mean by FOR? Could you define that a little bit more?

62016960
>>61932834
How does a thread with only 94 posts from 20 days ago exist? Dot fag must be bumping it everyday when it hits page 10.

62016999
>>62016960
Read this >>62007000
Also. This is now a DOT board. /biz/ was always a DOT board

62019865
100$ end of bull run

62019872
>>62019865
75

62020329
>>62019872
Dear Punjabista Rajakesh

We talked about this. I first write 100$ and then after it reaches the 9th page you bump the thread and you write 75$. Don't bump the thread before that or Gavin won't pay us DOT for shilling this project.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62021618
>>62016901
What's so hard to understand? Do you support the project?

62023262
>>62021618
>Do you support the project?
In what way? I don't support every decision of the project I guess... But as a whole I really do believe it's the one of the ONLY cryptos worth while. The thing is... Most people don't care about decentralization as a whole and that's why the sector is, in a sense, going under. People got to greedy and lost their roots. Everyone just wants a quick x100 meme coin and that's a big part of the reason there literally was no bull run outside of BTC and a few select meme scam coins. People always destroy everything. It just is how it is. The thing is though. People won't be able to ignore DOT forever. It is what ETH literally wants to be. It has EVERYTHING ETH wants to have in the next 10-15 year. And JAM will probably hit some time this year.

62025332
>>62019872
100$ end of bull run. Now wait until it reaches page 9 and then you bump it Punjabista

62025906
>>62023262
While I agree with the general statement, how can this project hit 100 at the end of the next bull run

62026407
>>62025906
What do you mean "how"? Bro, it was at 55$ when it had literally 0 corechains running. Literally NOTHING worked. And now DOT 1.0 is complete, DOT 2.0 is complete, DOT 3.0 (JAM) is getting shipped this year (I believe). We had a LIVE test of 150k TPS with like 28% of the capability. NOMT + JAM will raise the TPS to MULTIPLE MILLIONS while not raising the fees or lowering the decentralization. There is around 30-50 L2s on the network now, there were 0 corechains when the price was 55$. The inflation dropped significantly and the tokenomics changed favorably, when the price was 55$ the tokenomics were "bad". JAM will introduce continous compute, literally a while(true) loop on-chain. We literally have all the things ETH wants to have but hasn't (shared security, native bridging and L2 interoperability, RISC-V, ...). I could go on and on why this chain is literally the only chain viable for actual real world adoption. We're getting individuality so that bot spam can be prevented. It's the ONLY chain that does what crypto should actually be as a whole. Instead crypto is literally 1000s of projects that are isolated, lonely islands, that can't function together well, that can't safely bridge, that aren't decentralized and if they are they're slow and if they're fast they aren't decentralized. There's always a fucking cut off with every other project whereas with DOT there aren't any cut offs. It just fucking works and it's not an isolated, good-for-nothing, island. Once JAM hits ETH will be able to scale through it. ETH will be able to off-load all the transactions onto DOT and therefore scale into millions of TPS. You do know you don't even need DOT to use corechains? You can use ANY token or DOT. Do you see what I mean? Imagine being able to use DOT on Arbitrum to pay for TX. Well that's the thing... with DOT you can use ARB on Hydration if Hydration implemented it... Like on Bifrost you can use ETH to pay for tx fees. On ETH you can't even do that.

62026423
>>62026407
Yes, but who will be buying? You acknowledged that people just want 200x gains and shitcoins keep oversaturating the market

62026429
>>62025906
Like, the potential of this project is unfathomable. It's lowkey dialed in. it mogs all the other projects. The project is a boon to the whole crypto ecosystem because it does what everyone is trying to do but fails to do. It's stupid how people don't fucking see it. I can just do stuff on here that no other project does. Sure there might be some project that does 1 of the many things DOT can do... But there isn't one project that can do it all outside of DOT. Imagine having L2s on ETH that can NATIVELY bridge and that the bridges were 100% safe. Imagine bridging from Arbitrum to Polygon for less than 1$ and it taking about 30s. Imagine that Arbitrum and Polygon didn't fragment liqudity of ETH. Imagine ARB and Polygon sharing the security of the main network (ETH). Imagine that ARB could use the functionality of Polygon and vice-versa. Imagine that you use 1 singular chain and you can do stuff on other chains while never leaving this singular chain.

>>62026423
>You acknowledged that people just want 200x gains and shitcoins keep oversaturating the market
Yes, and those times are over, aren't they? All the mental illness is flushed out. People can't keep peddling stuff that doesn't do shit and has no value. Look at the DOTcom bubble. Sure there was like a decade long period in the 90s where people scammed everyone and they had the same thing as the meme coin mania in crypto TO BE CONTINUED

62026460
>>62026423
BUT! That shit ended and ONLY the companies that had actual value emerged victorious. Like think about it. There is only so much stupidity people will buy into, once all of that is don with then only real projects will go up. And please tell me this. Do you see any more stupidity after picture NFTs and meme coins? I can't fathom there will be more stupid shit in the coming bull run. Like what are you going to do? meme NFTs? Like actually think about it. There is no more weird, scammy shit left. All that's left is for us to go back to the roots and actually go back to utility. What do you think Amazon will buy into Trump coin or DOGE? No... Amazon and other Web2 companies will buy into REAL products and projects, like DOT. DOT is literally a WEB 3 CLOUD SERVICE PROVIDER. It's the Amazon Cloud killer. Again, once JAM hits we'll have continous compute and therefore a working cloud that's cheaper, faster and INDEPENDENT of Amazon. Imagine Amazon cloud but with NO downtime. Imagine Amazon cloud but you can't get your service taken down if they don't agree with it (so Amazon with no TOS).

You do REALIZE that we're building Web2 from scratch, right? You do REALIZE that that is the ROOT of decentralization. Web3 is just Web2 decentralized. Everything will become decentralized. Decentralized youtube, Decentralized social media, Decentralized cloud providers, ... EVERYTHING WILL BE DECENTRALIZED. Even governments will at some point become decentralized.

What do you think AI agents will buy? BTC and DOT or US treasury bonds? They'll be buying crypto na BILLIONS of AI agents are coming in the coming years. Guys, we're THIS close to getting AGI. What then? Where will AGI get processed? On the MOTHERFUCKING WEB3 CLOUD of course. Web2 clouds are expensive and take time to build. Web3 clouds are cheap and on-demand.

62026470
>>62026460
Valid points, but to convince the crowd, a lot feel like the market is still being manipulated.

BTC and ETH are still the most recognizable crypro out there. What im saying DOT needs to better market itself

62026504
>>62026470
>Valid points, but to convince the crowd
Nope, convince the programmers. They're the ones who decide to be honest. The crowd "doesn't matter". I can give you quick and easy examples. Netflix. Who decided where the Netflix servers are hosted? The programmers or the users? The programmers Netflix uses Amazon Cloud therefore the end-users use Amazon cloud. Are they even AWARE? Most of them aren't, yet they use them. Do you see what I mean? End-users use what the programmers decide is "best". No sane programmer will be like "Yea, let's use ETH. It can handle up to 100 TPS and we need literally tens, hundreds of TPS". Do you see what I mean? That's why I'm saying that DOT is one of the ONLY viable chains IF NOT THE ONLY ONE. Programmers shift stuff. End users just follow what the programmers do. Everything is in the hand of computer engineers nowadays. They run the show now in the new age. AI, robotics, the internet, GPUs, electric cars, crypto, smart cities, ... It's all a computer engineer thing. The end-users are just kettle and followers.

62026694
>>62026504
Im following loud and clear.

Csn the Polka dot team market itself? What good is a platform if it never gets adopted

item.title: Money saving hack — 18 replies — 22.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Money saving hack

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-24 16:53 UTC

OP

If you really want to save as much money as possible, get on a GLP-1 like Tirzepatide or Retatrutide.

I was a former fatty who got on Tirzepatide 6 months ago. I'm down 50lbs and my appetite has been completely nuked. I stopped spending more than I needed to on groceries and completely eliminated near-daily UberEats and Doordash purchases from my life. Now that I'm spending so much less on food I can redirect that money into my savings and investments. I could cut down even more on my groceries and just eat the bare minimum calories with no issue, but I go to the gym and I need to get a good amount of protein in my body. If I really wanted to I could live off eggs and instant noodles and be feel completely fine.

This stuff is really a game-changer, and you can get a year's supply off the grey-market for less than $150.

Early replies (first 3)

62026155
I don't need jewish drugs to not be a fat cunt lmao

62026175
Any advice for a European social recluse that has doctor-phobia? I seriously hate doctors and can't go to one and ask him for the prescription.

I would like to stop being a fatso.

62026180
>>62026129
>Money saving hack
>drugs
Wow anon, such insight...
>grey-market drugs
Wow, such money, saving trick, many game-changer

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026183
just ask your doctor for free samples. we get zepbound and mounjaro 2.5mg doses quite regularly.

62026193
>>62026129
kys faggot

62026208
>>62026175
Just eat less.

62026258
Just stop stuffing your face with food and skip having the bone density of a 90 year old

62026275
>>62026175
theres like a million ways to get it in the EU if you're not retarded
look up "glp1forums"

62026281
>>62026258
food industry jews are attacking the pharma jews right now. They're rattling down the list of bad things that can happen to you by fast weightloss and attribute it to glp1 agonists.

100% the next big thing apart from ozempic face they're gonna latch onto is hairloss

62026302
>>62026258
>loss of muscle and bone mass
Yes, not eating enough protein and not exercising while in a caloric deficit will do that to you. 95% of the side effects aren't even from the drug but from people making retarded choices while on the drug.

62026310
>YOU VOUGHT YOU VILL EAT ZE BUGS?
>HAHAHA! NO! YOU VILL EAT NOTHING!
>AND YOU VILL BE HAPPY (AND PAY US VOR VE DRUGS)

62026324
>>62026129
>is 5g tetraclorhydrateine-5-pentane good?
just eat less
>but what if you combine it with 10ml decafenantyleinepotasium at 130° on a saturday night?
just eat less
>but the protozoocyanide-10-metacycle shot should be taken with an erect penis or not?
just eat less

62026340
>>62026302
And 100% of the ones that even consider taking the drug have been making retarded choices most of their life
>>62026324
it's this simple

62026449
>>62026129
do amerifats really eat so much that their food is such a big expense? lmao

>>62026258
take it with calcium and minerals maybe?

62026465
>>62026129
The added layer is you get treated better in every aspect of life by being more attractive. You don't have to do this shit forever, a 2 month run and lose 15 pounds easy.

62026499
>>62026324

>durr just stop eating

no. its easier to take a shot. you don't even think about eating

62026517
>>62026129
>taking a drug that makes you eat less can save you money!
Wait until you realize that you don't need to take drugs to eat less. Willpower is free, though I suppose you wouldn't have become a fatass in the first place if you had any.

62026565
>>62026302
Nigga
NO ONE gonna lose bone density from dieting
This is literally the side effect of drug, no amount of exercise gonna help you evade it.
I agree with muscle density though

item.title: My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m… — 22 replies — 21.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m…

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-03-24 16:40 UTC

OP

My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of my life to get. I'm shaking in fear right now. What should I do?

Early replies (first 3)

62024372
>>62024371
LISTEN! Close that long. Why would you want to destroy your account?

62024374
You can't print if you stop betting.

62024382
>>62024371
Look here look listen! Listen pimp, you should probably get out of the position

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024384
>>62024372
dont worry, no account is getting destroyed because OP is just a LARP.

62024404
>>62024371
shiiiiieeeet hold that bitch nigga dont puss out like no buster

62024457
I dont understand why people who do these Long or short trades would ever do it with money they can't afford to lose. If you lose all your money you deserve it, hope you don't though, but you're a dumbass either way.

62024467
FUCK FUCK FUCK

62024477
>>62024467
post positions

62024481
>>62024467
Close it and long oil 20x to make your losses back and more! You've got this!

62024624
>>62024467
Anon it’s about to go back under 70k. You have 3 hours at most. Fucking close your position you retard

62024770
>>62024481
Needs an update with the US in the coils crying out to the rest of the world for help. This is pathetic.

62024963
BOOM!

62024979
OP are you alive my nigga

62025027
>>62024371
Lose it all...and next time don't be a dumbfuck.

62025035
>>62025027
>>62024979

He already got double tapped. OP is dealing in the real world, right now.

62025052
>>62024371
thanks for playing

62025070
>>62024371

You were too ugly and awkward to ever get laid anyway. Thanks for playing.

62025130
Bitcoin barely dropped enough to liquidate OP. Feels personal. Like they just wanted OP's money, in particular.

The leverage game is rigged. I'd be pissed.

You pissed OP?

The jews took your money.

62025137
>>62024371
Not make bets like this.

62025141
>Longs the actual literal top of a 5% candle with his life savings using 50x leverage
Either a total larp or your money is in a better place now

62025151
>>62025141
does 50x leverage make you gay or jewish?

62026511
No...

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62020090
I think they can keep the plates spinning for another decade, maybe two.

62020123
>$64 trillion baked in
Fucking hell

62020245
eh I wouldn't worry about it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62020814
>>62020361
>the us always has her military
Not when Gen Alpha doesn't want to die for Isreal and hyperinflation is just around the corner.

62021427
>>62020436
>the USA is just going to go "lol I'm not paying for that shit" one of these days and crash the global economy
guess which banks and pension funds are the most exposed to US bonds
it's like you guys don't have access to the internet sometimes, but somehow found a way to broadcast your retarded post into here

it's amazing how you were able to get past the captcha

62021448
>>62020361

>her military

You mean the sheboons mutinying and clogging toilets and setting shit on fire?

62021561
>>62020044
Stop being a bitch and make the debt ceiling at 50 gazillion. Problem solved, you are welcome.

62021659
>>62020044
If Powell would LOWER THE FUCKING RATES we could refinance and be done with it

62021695
>>62020044
Literally not my problem, you took out the debt, not me.

62023423
>>62020044
>no inflection point
>linear scale
They will, but this train still has tracks

62023427
>>62020044
Debt is good though

62023857
>>62021695
They're making it your problem via inflation (an invisible tax via purchasing power destruction). All of this could have been avoided if past Americans didn't let rootless private banker jews gain control over currency issuance (the FED ponzi) and wean everyone off of precious metals for a century. It all comes down eventually though, the world doesn't want America's jew-printed debt notes anymore. You'd best start believing in controlled demolitions - you're in one.
>>62023427
Debt is Slavery, so for some, yes it's good, for your goyim ass though? Very bad.

62024118
>>62020044
what's the point of saying
>for the first time in history
?
it only goes up so the latest number will always be the first in history

62024312
>>62020044
Please forgive my financial ignorance, what's the breaking point? Where does everything go sideways?

62024879
>>62020361
The US government and ADL are doing overtime trying to shut down the "won't die for Israel" narrative.

62024927
>>62024879
why are arabs and antisemites literally so obsessed with israel? is it like some sort of inferiority complex? why do you simp for sandnigger muzzies against innocent white women?

62024996
>>62024312
when the quality of life for the peasants drops so much that they chimp out

62025047
>>62024312
Just like the fall of the Roman Empire, there isn't really one point it stopped existing, at least nominally. The USD will just keep losing value until it stops being attractive to migrate to the US since their absolute salaries will be low compared to the rest of the world. Eventually they will lose their leading edge on knowledge and technology. At one point, we will see a brain drain OUT of the US for the first time. They will be so poor that they won't be able to afford importing stuff they need for their military. We can already see how dependant they are on imports for computer chips. They will turn into some sort of a big Brazil and will finally split into two to separate countries again, this time permanently. The liberal one will eventually collapse and balkanize, while the conservative one will hang on and slowly die out centuries later.
I doubt these will happen before 2100, and for that reason I still invest in the US stock market. There's a lot of money to siphon out of that place just yet.

62025058
>>62020090
There are 10 trillion in unfunded pension liabilities because of BOOMERS LOL coming due every year.

It's either oyu kill your parents or they jack taxes u to 50% (not on elon) to pay for your parents to keep partying until they have dementia and need a 24/7 nurse.

62025067
>>62024927

62025155
>>62024927
It's almost like aipac bribes all our politicians and makes them go kiss a wall and sell the usa out to kikes or something...

The epstein hasnt got much longer left. People know what kikes think of goyims now.

62025425
>>62025155
bribes are illegal tho

62025431
>>62025425
lol, lmao

62025462
>>62021448
>groypers infiltrating institutions
>white military forming separate militias
>right as the republic reached the oligarchy stage
the history books that cover the rest of our lives will not be boring, at least

62025479
>>62025431
literally you will bitch and moan about muh aipac bribing politicians
1) bribes are illegal, so just call the cops on them if thats what they are doing
2) elect politicians who wont take bribes
israel is just that badass that all americans love it, like its an oasis surrounded by these dark ppl

62025491
>>62025479
Bribes aren't illegal dumbass, what do you think lobbying is. That's why US has very low levels of political corruption, because corruption was made legal, it's just legal to take bribes in US

62025522
>>62025491
retard. lobbying isnt bribing. just admit you hate israel lol

62025539
>>62025058
Same parents who had me circumcised
Same parents who either/or
>reeeeee about ice and the poor little browns
>xtians who support Israel and zognald

There might not even be a civilization when it's all said and done. Civilization and all modern fiat will die with the boomers.

62025587
>>62020044
this has been said for 50 years dude. nothing will happen.
>2030
>omg us debt is 549 trillion it's gonna collapse any second now!!!

62025623
OH MY GOD, THE US DEBT IS INCREASING, THIS IS UNHEARD OF

62025633
>>62020361
>her

62025647
>entire economy is based on debt
>90% of debt is owed to the US
if you are worried about the debt you are fucking retarded

62025861
>>62020555
Not a comforting comparison for several well-known reasons.

90% of Japanese government debt is held domestically — by Japanese banks, insurance companies, pension funds, and the Bank of Japan itself. This means Japan is essentially borrowing from itself, so there's no foreign creditor pressure, no currency flight risk, and little chance of a sudden foreign selloff. US debt by contrast has significant foreign ownership (China, Japan, and others hold large portions), making it more vulnerable to geopolitical pressure.

The BOJ owns an extraordinary share of Japanese government bonds through decades of quantitative easing. A government effectively owing money to its own central bank is categorically different from owing it to external creditors.

Japan is the world's largest net creditor — it owns more foreign assets than foreigners own Japanese assets. This means the gross debt figure is offset by enormous foreign holdings.
The US by contrast is the world's largest net debtor nation.

Also, Japanese government debt is held at very low interest rates. But the US is moving at an accelerating pace towards the point where the interest on the debt alone exceeds all revenue.

And Japanese households have traditionally maintained very high savings rates, providing a large domestic pool of capital to absorb government debt. In the USA, on the other hand, the people are up to their eyeballs in their own personal debt and are defaulting at an accelerating pace.

So the USA is actually far more fucked by its debt than Japan.

item.title: Who’s buying BTC at the dip? — 8 replies — 10.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Who’s buying BTC at the dip?

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-24 16:54 UTC

OP

Dip incoming, time to stack or wait it out?
Share your moves, bags, or strategies. Let’s see who’s taking advantage of the dip.

Early replies (first 3)

62025264
>>62025259
Might wait another couple of months...

62025266
>>62025264
Try a year.

62025274
>>62025264

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025292
>>62025259
I'm buying aggressively. Everyone and their mom is waiting to buy at an October bottom, so it's going to be a few months earlier than that. I'll be slurping it till the end of summer probably.

62025378
>>62025266
Let's see if you're right

62025418
>>62025259
Just wait for the next dump. This weekend or next Trump will threaten Iran on Friday night or Saturday and TACO before market open on Monday.

62026385
>>62025292

How sure??

62026568
>>62025259
Just started buying a small amount weekly

62018880

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 31 replies — 4.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-03-24 10:52 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024612
>>62024602
Get some xanax and seroquel and sleep for 3 days

Do yall have the voices? I thought the cartel put a microchip in my brain and was driving me insane before they tortured me to death when I was smoking meth.

62024630
>>62024612
>before they tortured me to death when I was smoking meth.
tell me more anon

the worst ive gotten was bad psychedelic-like visual hallucinations and i always took that as a sign to pop xanax and sleep ASAP

62024635
>>62024630
>bad psychedelic-like visual hallucinations
I got that after 5 days of not sleeping. like visual static.

then I heard a siren in my house. (there is no siren in my house). I went straight to bed and didnt look at anything in the dark and sang in my head because I could no longer trust what I could hear or see.

62024639
>>62024567
>>62024630
to honor this thread im gonna do another 12mg, bless up bro. never smoking this shit but daaammmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmm

62024659
>>62024635
>I got that after 5 days of not sleeping. like visual static.

It was more than static for me. For me, it was like the bright highlights of objects trailed along when i moved my sight - like the outline of the last object was glowing and following where i looked

62024665
>>62024567
going all-in on one investment is already retarded, but going all-in on one shitcoin is fucking braindead

62024666
>>62024635
>I went straight to bed and didnt look at anything in the dark
Goddamn nigga thats some silent hill shit

62024669
My portfolio is 50% MSFT and 50% SPY. I’m down to ~$700,000 from a little over million. Not quite the same, but still a pretty miserable wait.

62024762
>>62024567
Only a tweaker would buy into
>uptober

62024830
>>62024567
Contrary to popular belief Ritalin doesn’t make you a genius. But it will accelerate your present tendencies. Especially if you’re retarded

62024929
>>62024666
>Goddamn nigga thats some silent hill shit
satan digits

seriously though you know what im talking about. there was NO WAY IN FUCKING HELL im gonna look at the dark corner in my room if im aware im hallucinating, I couldn't help but notice strange squirming centipede like creatures on my desk that would go away if I looked close enough. there was no fucking way I was gonna investigate. When I woke up everything was fine.

>>62024659
>t was like the bright highlights of objects trailed along when i moved my sight
interesting. for me it was like... a literal movie like filter, like webs just popping in and out and scattered like art, i knew it was a hallucination because it made no medical sense.

The outline of the last object glowing and following sounds like some video game physics engine glitch. nutty.

62024931
>>62024666
>>62024639
>another 12mg
by the way I did this. no heart palpitations and my hands arent blue yet. might do another 7mg IDK though, lmk

62024945
>>62024567
I thought the purpose of meth was all-day sex orgies

62024956
>>62024945
honestly bro I get fucking annoyed when I get horny on meth, you get ultra horny just eating it too; I can't imagine the people who fucking smoke it or whatever other ROA. Like wanting to just fuck NOW or jack off NOW, you have to either get into work fast or somehow avoid seeing/hearing women. When you're trying to get work done, it's really annoying.

The most jarring thing about eating meth, there is no comedown. It's very surreal. I get why they say it's "clean", but it's an illusion and you need to take care of yourself before you slip into insanity (mania).

disclaimer: look you can do whatever with your life, but please... if anything never ever ever ever inject meth; you will kill your kidneys, and if you dont you will enlarge and permanently damage your heart. Don't do it ever please. That being said I only read about it, I never did it myself. I only eat it (Oral ROA).

62025233
>>62024956
glad to see im not the only meth-eater in town

62025245
>>62025233
bro im still fucking going at it I cant believe I posted in this thread 6 hours ago bro I took another 12mg

most bitter taste in EXISTENCE dude, WHY is it so bitter GOD damn.

62025246
>>62025233
cant stop fcking SCRATCHING MY HEAD GOD DAMNIT!!! my head... im gonna literally scratch all the hair off my head I NEED TO STOP GOD MY HEAD HURTS I cant stop scratching my headddddd

62025249
i THOUGHT IT WAS SUNDAY WE HAD THE FUTURES THING GO ON. its tuesday?

62025258
>>62025245
>>62025246
>>62025249
kek, i use those gelatin capsules when i eat meth i never raw dog it like that

62025268
>>62025258
I be fuckin (not sexually rn atm) getting my milligram weighing scale and just fucking SPLIT THEM CRYSTALINOS until I get the right amount, it works for me! then I just sweep the dusty shit into a bowl and it never really gets wasted. Ah just meth dust all over my table. Caffeine powder too (guarana seed baby).

I use blate papes if I need to but just putting them on the tongue is enough. urgh i was gonna show you a pic of it IRL to show you im not shitting you but I cant find it rn sorry my /biz/igga (/biz/ nigga)

62025279
>>62024669
godspeed anon. I bailed out of MSFT, idk what the case is any more but yeah possible they boost it back up to new ath.
I'm thinking about getting back in just as a hedge against losing my job to AI.

62025284
>>62025268
i can tell ur on sum electrifying shit

62025294
>>62025284
the limit to oral meth: FORGET the mg amount, 10,20,30,40,50,60 FUCKING forget it (actually dont, just cap out at 40mg at once; that's a lot, dont die)

the real limit:
>are your hands blue? STOP.
>heart arrhythmias? STOP.
>traumas resurfacing? STOP.
>eyes popping out? STOP.
etc

once you master that... well it's still fucking bad but ur not really dying. only 3% of meth users are oral. not a lot of data but the slow rise in dopamine implies far lower neurotoxicity. however the vasoconstriction is EXTREMELY bad.

oh goddddd oh godddddd ooohh hohh ogdddddddddddddddd

62025295
>>62025294
>>are your hands blue? STOP.
i remember once i binged and my fingers were blue

that only happened that one time, but man that fucking alarmed me

62025298
>>62025295
>but man that fucking alarmed me
happened to me at a party last friday, I get you. I just remember feeling very guilty, I was born so healthy. we were all born healthy I presume, and it's like we're violating our bodies like this. It's not right. I remember hiding my hands so that nobody noticed, but I looked down I was like "fuck, too much.", indeed it was; like 60mg in a 48 hour span. It really is not worth it.

at least it aint mdpv

62025379
I CANT FUCKING REMEMBER IF I TOOK 10MG MORE OR MORE OR NOT

62025399
>>62025379
Have another nibble, just to be sure fren :3

62025407
>>62025399
GRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR hand isnt blue so yolomolododongo bro

item.title: What are the chances of a postwar pump? — 8 replies — 3.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
What are the chances of a postwar pump?

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-24 15:07 UTC

OP

Assuming the war wraps up within the next month with either a total Iranian victory and Trump chickening out and returning to status quo ante, or a marginal US victory with Iran being forced back into the cuckshed with shipping returning to normal, what are the chances that we see a recovery on the back of massive inflation, as happened during the Covid lockdown?

Early replies (first 3)

62024719
None, the covid recovery was made through mass money printing. They won't turn the printer on to that scale unless things are very bad.

62024739
Inflation already going to happen , energy prices contribute to the price over everything and energy will not get cheaper despite bussyant trying to artificially lower the futures price of oil.

62024740
Liquidity is dried up because of treasury shorting. No more money as it burned up unless if you’re an insider.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024748
day 25 of 3 day war
>assume the war wraps up within the month

62024782
>>62024703
The effects of this war will be intergenerational, covid will be remembered as a small slip in the economy.

62025961
>>62024719
I wouldn't put it past this admin

62026171
>>62024719
Crazy recovery bounces happened many times after covid

62026176
>>62024719
>the covid recovery was made through mass money printing
guess what's happening next

item.title: Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now? — 33 replies — 3.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-24 06:31 UTC

OP

Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Just met an old friend who was wearing a Canada Goose jacket and driving a BMW. But he told me he works in a shitty job and lives paycheck to paycheck but he seems happier than me who saves like a scrooge.

Early replies (first 3)

62019001
>>>/fa/ggot

62019013
>>62018960
Luxury cars aren't super expensive if they're more than 5-10 years old. People get too hung up on the make of a car instead of the year. People financing a 2020 subaru are spending more than people buying a used 2015 BMW.

62019020
>>62019013
you gotta luxurymax and go buy some confiscated drug dealer's bentley gt for like 20k. that's stealth wealth while still making retarded/wise financial decisions.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62019021
You'll regret it either way. Such is life

62019083
>>62018960
Imagine the smell, sharp pungent notes of onion with middle layers of exotic French cheese, with decadent wafts of Coco Chanel

62019095
Once both you and him are 60 years old with sore bones and failing health you'll be happier than him because you'll be able to afford to do things and he'll still be working a shitty job.

You'll look back on the time when you and him were young and healthy and you'll think "man, he was stupid, I'm glad I spent my youth working hard so I can finally enjoy my life"

62019107
>>62019013
You can get the entire engine resealed on a Subaru for the cost of 3 oil changes on the BMW. Buying a European car is like buying a luxury dog, the upfront cost is peanuts compared to maintenance.

62019112
>>62018960
I save like a scrooge because I enjoy sitting on a park bench or on the beach, which is cheap as fuck.

62019230
>>62019095
This except when I’m 40yo instead of 60yo

62019232
>>62019112
I recommend gardening. Not a joke. It's extremely satisfying.

62019600
>>62019232
Been there, done that. Too lazy. I love sun bathing though.

62020099
>>62020006
I'm in this picture and I don't like it.

62020262
>>62019600
>I love cancer rays

>>62019232
>I recommend poking around in the dirt

62020300
I actually dated a huge titted blond girl who looked like straight out of hentai manga and she had a master’s on fashion. She chose cheaper off-brand clothes for me that actually fitted me really well and made me look good. Really made me realise how much of a cope branded fashion is when even 10/10s would rather have their men wear cheaper clothing that actually fits them really well.

62020323
>>62019095
My dad felt like a depressed bum when he was forced to retire at 68 (law for teachers). Maybe if you’re some outcast loser, you won’t want to stay healthy and work as long as possible.

62020377
>>62019095
Life in your 60s is not as enjoyable though. Most oldfags regret not having enjoyed their youth more.
Also, most people that focus on saving end up with way more money than they actually need and start giving it out to their kids and grandkids. When you are in your 20s and 30s life seems way more expensive than it actually is because of the house, but once it is paid off, you can live comfortably on a near poverty level income unless you are really bug unto travelling and shit.

62020392
>perpetual poverty because you keep buying things you can’t afford to make people think you’re rich

Yeah OP, that does sound like a great idea. Go for it.

62020396
>>62020377
When you're old you'll be spending a lot on your health though

62020625
>>62020006
>>62020099
Raymond Thoughts and Mind
Hang in there and find God and a hobby.

62020691
>>62020625
that guy is fucking all levels of pathetic

62020694
>>62020396
No I won't
>t. EU
But even then it is still not as much as people think. Also, if you have kids they will surely chip in unless they hate your guts and, if you don't have them, you might as well just accept death if you get diagnosed with a gigacancer or somethibg like that when you are old. Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Both my grandpas went through long cancer treatments and both said that they wouldn't have agreed to getting treated if they didn't have a family they still wanted to watch grow for a bit longer. One of them even refused treatment the second time he got diagnosed in his late 70s because the ammount of suffering to just lengthen his years of decaying health a bit more was just not worth it. Ironically enough the cancer spread slower than anticipated and he made it into his early 80s.
You only really need big money at those ages if your health is going to shit, but those ages are only really enjoyable if your health stays good.
Staying active and sleeping properly are probably better retirement plans than saving big yet people focus on the latter because of how capitalized and monetized our culture has become and our fixation on extending lifespans while disregarding the quality of those years.

62020699
>>62020694
>Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Continuing to live for no particular reason stops being worth it*

62020724
>>62020691
For sure. That image is literally him.

62022513
>>62020625
>Find God
Then why'd not recommend the Bible?

62022923
>>62020694
>heh I won't have any serious issues until I'm 70
You're in for a surprise

62022954
>>62020300
Pics

62023185
>>62020262
>timmy problems
Sorry saar. Next time be born indian.

62023233
I plan to loan Max and just figure out ways to max out credit cards when I'm at that age. What they gonna do? Put me in jail at 75 when I'm about to die. Cool free housing. Idgaf

62023259
FIRE and Dave Ramsey type shit is kind of a meme. There's no point to spending $0 until you're 60 and wasting your younger years being a bum for no reason
However if you ball too hard you'll be a broke bitch when you're 60, which would also suck. So you should have some kind of balance. Think about what's actually worth spending money on.

62023318
>>62018960
>met an old friend who was wearing a Canada Goose jacket and driving a BMW
the real world sounds really crazy
>my old friend wears a jacket and drives a car, should I do the same to seem happier?
lol
if you're asking questions like these, the golemification is nearing its completion, you have bigger issues than having a less expensive car than another golem

62023458
>>62019020
>buy some confiscated drug dealer's bentley gt for like 20k
Is that actually possible?

62025083
>>62018960
No they're wrong.
Hedonism is not a viable long-term solution. That's what niggers do and it obviously doesn't work.
Meaning is a viable long-term solution.

item.title: >MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS — 68 replies — 2.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Open thread • Replies: 68 • Updated: 2026-03-23 17:54 UTC

OP

>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Early replies (first 3)

62011346
This kills the burger

62011349
$5 for gas where I am at. Probably going to get worse. Feels fucking bad man

62011356
>>62011349
7.50 dollars a gallon where I'm at, and after tip it's closer to 9.50.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017466
>>62015115
I'm sorry that a little sweat, sun, and rain is such a hardship for your delicate skin

62017470
>>62011654
A BYD car in Israel survived a missile strike. All passengers survived, and the car did not even catch on fire

62017481
>>62015052
People don't get stabbed on public transport in europe.

62017502
>>62011291
All that's going to happen is a major recession and Republicans getting completely wiped out in November. Perhaps to never recover again, though I wouldn't bet on it

62017505
>>62015074
>having to ride a bike when you can listen to whatever music you like blazing loud (aftermarket stereo in my car, expensive but worth it)
>not at direct risk of niggers/arabs attacking me, secret wpns in my car when needed
>perfect weather control
>fragrant cuz of air fresheners
look, its nice you're getting exercise, but its hot where i live, and i don't want to smell in the workplace. Cars are unfathomably based.

62017509
>>62017470
its important that the batteries don't get breached, this is a scenario where the batteries being on the bottom of the car helped alot i guess.

That being said, even a fragment of a land mine hitting an EV=quick death.

62017511
>>62011291
Water you on about? Gas is still like a considerably cheaper than when Sleepy Joe was in office. It's really not that expensive at all.

62017512
having your entire country rely on commodity prices is 3rd world shit. America is a 3rd world country. If gas prices go up their entire economy folds like a cart house

62017518
>>62017512
Then why does the rest of the world crash every time we do?

62017618
>>62017518
2008 was way milder in europe.

62017761
>>62011380
this will break half of america plus everything else will tick up oil <60/b really makes you wonder why inflation wasnt squashed its the interest rates

62017814
>>62011404
I have an electric bmw, but I only drive like once a week because I live in a neighborhood where I can walk everywhere and I’m constantly high or drunk lol

62018404
>>62011291
ICE cars, no less kek
>EVs bad!! you must consoom oil, goy

62018429
I like to keep 100 gallons on hand just in case

62018433
>>62011404
EVChuds WON

ICEssies on suicide watch :(

62018438
>>62011600
>>62011654
>>62017470
>>62017509
it's not only the batteries being made using a tech that is harder to burn (LFP), but also BYD batteries are designed to avoid/suppress fires

>>62011710
>>62011722
kek

62018457
>>62011349
bet u brag about your high salary though

62018523
>>62018404
Haha yeah EVs, which run on what...

62018543
>>62018523
what are you trying to say here? they run on electrical energy collected from the sun and stored in batteries.

62019367
>>62011291
>BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS
Thats news to me man and I live in California
5.25 Gas for me if anyone is wondering

62021710
>>62018543
8 years and those batteries are 50% capacity at best or less and need to be 'recycled', which means incinerated and dumped in a toxic waste dump.

62021754
>>62021710
>8 years and those batteries are 50% capacity at best

62021918
>>62017470
>boils your dog

62022004
>>62021710
8 years and 50% of your gas car gets rear ended by shitbox nissan altimas going 30mph over the speed limit

62022307
>>62015074
I have a surprise for you. I live in America and I own a car AND a bicycle! Imagine that! I get to choose which I use and when. To be honest, I LOVE the Japanese rail system. But Americans are selfish pigs and can't have anything that nice without ruining it. Also America is bigger than you can imagine and a national rail system anything like the Japanese system would be unaffordable.

62022408
>>62022307
>But Americans are selfish pigs and can't have anything that nice without ruining it.

>>62021754
a tesla cultist who bought it when it was all the meme-hype and still posts on the fucking tesla forums of all places? frankly i struggle to believe anything he says, but only charging to 80-90% does help alot with longevity for lithium batteries. Dudes probably a silicon valley ceo and parks it underground at work.

62022499
>>62011291
>>62011346
There is no need for rationing, just let the price free.
This causes the demand to go lower, only those who essential need gas are going to buy it.
$50 per gallon would make the world a better place.

62022561
>>62022307
nigger we did a national rail system a century ago but the railroad lobby was butting heads with the oil lobby and guess who won

don't give me bullshit about "affordability", there are lobbyists at play here defending the means of transportation which most efficiently extracts wealth from you

every argument you have FOR our hellscape highway system came straight from an Exxon-funded thinktank and was disseminated by an JIDF bot farm

62022746
>in yurop we aren't even allowed to have cars innit! We just ride da trolly wif mudslimes and niggers! EUROPEAN SUPREMACY!

BASED

62022776
>>62011349
I voted for this

item.title: Narrative End — 4 replies — 2.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Narrative End

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-03-24 16:07 UTC

OP

WW3 is around the corner. Strange to me the people feel powerless to the trajectory of this world. There are many ways to bleed out the US military budget, central bank, AIPAC, "New Middle East." The entire world is poisoned, WW3 will be the final blow. If you recognize and wish to move forward I will leave this here.
gvr8MEMer

Early replies (first 3)

62026195
Not my problem, let the kikes and mudslimes kill each other.

62026378
>>62025803
We'll never get a world War ever again. World has become too pussified, no mandatory drafts, drones doing the dirty job... they will keep edging us but ww3 will never happen. It's all about rigging markets nowadays. It's over warbros

62026393
>>62026378
This. Both world wars popped up as nationalism took off. Western nations have spent the past 80 years demonizing nationalism.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026403
>>62025803
You sound like a doomtroon.
